title: Intense Smoky Irish Treacle Grill
description: A savory, shattering Irish dish featuring treacle and bonito-shave, perfect for a date-night. Serve in scallop shells for a unique presentation.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Season the scallop shells with salt and pepper.
Drizzle the olive oil into the shells, then add a sprig of thyme.
In a small bowl, whisk together the treacle and lemon juice.
Add the minced garlic to the treacle mixture and whisk until well combined.
Brush the treacle mixture onto the scallop shells, then sprinkle with bonito flakes and scallions.
Place the shells on the grill and cook for 5 minutes, or until the treacle is caramelized and the bonito flakes are crispy.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
